allow: Bash(python -c "import json; nb = json.load\(open\(''rag_notebook.ipynb''\)\); print\(f''Total cells: {len\(nb[""cells""]\)}''\); [print\(f''Cell {i}: {cell[""cell_type""]} - {cell[""source""][0][:60] if cell[""source""] else ""empty""}''\) for i, cell in enumerate\(nb[''cells''][:30]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json, sys; nb = json.load\(open\(''''rag_notebook.ipynb'''', encoding=''''utf-8''''\)\); cells = nb[''''cells'''']; print\(f''''Total cells: {len\(cells\)}''''\); print\(''''\\n=== NOTEBOOK STRUCTURE ===\\n''''\); [print\(f''''Cell {i:3d} \({cell[""cell_type""]:8s}\): {str\(cell[""source""][:1]\)[0:80]}''''\) for i, cell in enumerate\(cells\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json; nb = json.load\(open\(''rag_notebook.ipynb'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); cells = nb[''cells'']; headings = [c for c in cells if c[''cell_type'']==''markdown'' and ''''.join\(c[''source'']\).startswith\(''#''\)]; print\(f''Total: {len\(cells\)} cells, {len\(headings\)} section headings''\); import re; [print\(f''{i}: {re.sub\(r""[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]"", """", """".join\(c[""source""]\).split\(chr\(10\)\)[0][:60]\)}''\) for i, c in enumerate\(headings[:20]\)]")
